final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with 奥特曼 as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-stakes China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear hierarchy: headline, sub-headline, presenter name, and branding zone
Subject: must include the GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme, with 奥特曼 credited as presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a polished, institutional Chinese roadshow backdrop atmosphere — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, premium-tech atmosphere — exact light and mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with GP / institutional investor pitch aesthetics (professional, restrained, trust-signaling) — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-end presentation surface feel — exact finish and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "演讲人：奥特曼" (presenter credit), and supporting roadshow copy consistent with 国内融资路演 context
Constraints: must conform to 国内融资路演 slide conventions; layout must read as a legitimate GP-facing pitch deck cover
Avoid:
